name: academic-research-skills
description: Codex-native Academic Research Skills suite for deep research, academic paper writing, manuscript review, research-to-paper pipelines, and experiment planning.

interface.shortDescription: Deep research, paper writing, review, and experiment planning.
interface.longDescription: Academic Research Skills for Codex supports Socratic research scoping, literature reviews, systematic reviews, IMRaD paper planning and drafting, manuscript revision coaching, peer-review simulation, citation and integrity checks, experiment planning, and staged research-to-paper workflows.
defaultPrompt: Plan my academic paper from rough research notes.
Review my manuscript like a journal reviewer.
Build a literature review and identify research gaps.
